fsymId.description: FactSet Security Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -S suffix (XXXXXX-S), resolved from the requestId of the Fund requested.

fsymEntityId.description: FactSet Entity Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -E suffix (XXXXXX-E), resolved from the requestId of the Fund requested.

fsymRegionalId.description: FactSet Regional Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -R suffix (XXXXXX-R), resolved from the requestId of the Fund requested.

fsymTickerRegion.description: FactSet Ticker-Region for the requested fund.

fsymUltimateParentId.description: The FactSet Ultimate Parent Entity Identifer, with a -E suffix (XXXXXX-E).

requestId.description: The requested Id sent as input.

activeFlag.description: Binary flag to indicate whether the fund is currently active, where 1 is active and 0 is inactive.

activelyManagedFlag.description: Binary indicator of whether the fund is actively managed, where 1 is active and 0 is inactive.

brand.description: The Funds Brand Name in proper format.

countryDomicile.description: Returns the fund's country of domicile in ISO2 format. Only available for Mutual Funds.

descInfo.description: The Fund's Investment Strategy short description.

fundOfFundsId.description: The fund of fund's id if applicable. Will provide plain Fund of Funds text.

inceptionDate.description: The fund's inception date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

insight.description: The fund's investment strategy long description. Use `descInfo` if needing short description.

issuerName.description: The Issuer Name in proper format.

legalStructure.description: The legal structure of the fund, e.g. Open-Ended Fund, close-ended fund

leverageFactor.description: The leverage factor of the fund.

leverageInverse.description: Indicates whether the fund is leveraged, inverse, or neither in proper format.

name.description: The Fund security's name in proper format.

navCurrency.description: The NAV currency for the specified share class.

priceFirstDate.description: The fund's first available date for prices (NAV) in YYYY-MM-DD format. This can be used to fetch the first available price from FactSet. *NOTE: This is not the inception date of fund.*

priceRecentDate.description: The fund's most recent available date for prices (NAV) in YYYY-MM-DD format.

shrClass.description: The Funds Share class type name in proper format.

shrClassActiveFlag.description: Returns a binary indicator of whether the specified share class is currently active, where 1 is active and 0 is inactive.

shrClsActivelyManagedFlag.description: Returns a binary indicator of whether the specified share class is actively managed, where 1 is active and 0 is inactive.

shrClsCurrency.description: The currency for the specified share class.

shrClsInceptDate.description: The specified share class's inception date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

shrClsName.description: The specified share class name for the fund in proper format.

shrClsTermDate.description: The Share class Termination Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If still active, value will be null.

terminationDate.description: The Termination Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. If still active, value will be null.

type.description: The Type of Fund, e.g. Mutual Fund, Unit Investment Trust
